message:
feat(conformance): add 28 WRONGTYPE cross-type error tests

Comprehensive cross-type error coverage ensuring WRONGTYPE is returned
when operating on keys with the wrong data type:
- String key: RPUSH, LPUSH, LRANGE, LLEN, SADD, SMEMBERS, SCARD,
  ZADD, ZRANGE, ZCARD, HSET, HGET, HGETALL all return WRONGTYPE
- List key: GET, APPEND, INCR, HSET all return WRONGTYPE
- Hash key: GET, RPUSH return WRONGTYPE
- Set key: ZADD, HSET return WRONGTYPE
- Sorted set key: SADD, LRANGE return WRONGTYPE

Total conformance cases: 3018 → 3046

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
